results.description: Colocated #[cfg(test)] blocks only permitted when testing private methods
Integration tests must not use mocking libraries or mock types
Sibling files sharing a common prefix must be grouped into a subdirectory module (e.g., check_runner.rs + check_result.rs → check/runner.rs + check/result.rs)

violations.message: 2 files in main/src/api/types/ share prefix 'breaker': breaker_config, breaker_layer — group into main/src/api/types/breaker/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

results.description: Every {implementation_layer}/ submodule must have a corresponding {interface_layer}/ submodule defining its types or traits

violations.message: main\src\core\default has no corresponding api interface counterpart
violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\default' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\default implements against

violations.message: main\src\core\default\http_breaker.rs has no corresponding api interface counterpart
violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\default\http_breaker.rs' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\default\http_breaker.rs implements against

violations.message: main\src\core\host has no corresponding api interface counterpart
violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\host' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\host implements against

violations.message: main\src\core\host\breaker has no corresponding api interface counterpart
violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\host\breaker' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\host\breaker implements against

violations.message: main\src\core\host\breaker\host_breaker.rs has no corresponding api interface counterpart
violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\host\breaker\host_breaker.rs' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\host\breaker\host_breaker.rs implements against

violations.message: main\src\core\host\breaker\state.rs has no corresponding api interface counterpart
violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\host\breaker\state.rs' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\host\breaker\state.rs implements against

results.description: saf/ must not re-export traits via pub use — wrap trait methods as standalone functions instead
api/ root must not contain loose .rs files or mixed-layout directories — only mod.rs at root; no flat traits/types/error/ dirs when domain-grouped layout (api/<domain>/traits/) is active
Source files must not suppress the dead_code lint via #[allow(dead_code)]
